props.message:
Wyrdkin Glade.

The wyrdkin sleep beneath the great trees, and Glim flickers at your shoulder. South, beyond the elder pines, the path runs to the Wyrdwood.
Glim chimes once, gently. "You can read what's left of the Source by Sight," she says, "but only one Sigil can pass it on. We carry that one."

A wyrdkin-stone, cool to the touch.

"Lirien's roots reach here. The Source whispers in the leaves — listen, and you may hear your own name spoken back."

props.open_message: A heart-flower, pressed in oilcloth. The Source thanks you.
